G.S.R. 482(E).- In the notification of the Government of India, in the Ministry of Environment and Forests published in the Gazette ofIndia, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i), dated the 22nd April 2013, vide notification number G.S.R. 260(E), dated the 17th April, 2013, at page 8, for "Iines I to 24", read "1. (1) These rules may be called the National Green Tribunal (Recruitment, Salaries and Other Terms and Conditions of Service of Officers and Other Employees) (Amendment) Rules, 2013. (2) They Shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the National Green Tribunal (Recruitment, Salaries and other Terms and Conditions of Service of Officers and other Employees) Rules, 2011, in the Schedule, after serial number 13 and entries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and entries shall be inserted, namely:- 3100 GI/2013 (1) -- 15 of 16 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY "SCHEDULE [PARTII-SEC. 3(i») , ( Name Number Classification Pay Band Whether Age limit Educational Whether age Period of of the of Post and selection for direct and other and probation if Post Grade Pay/ post or recruits qual ification educational any Scale of non required for qualification Pay selection direct prescribed post recruits for direct recruits will apply.
